headline: Heidi O’Neill’s 2026 Arrival Tests Lululemon’s Next Growth Chapter
summary: Lululemon Athletica has appointed Heidi O’Neill as its next CEO. O’Neill is scheduled to take on the role in September 2026. She brings extensive leadership experience from senior roles at Nike. Lululemon Athletica, listed on NasdaqGS:LULU, is making this leadership change after a challenging share price period. The stock last closed at $141.66, with returns of a 13% decline over the past 7 days, a 12% decline over 30 days, and a 32.8% decline year to date. Over 1, 3, and 5 years, returns...

headline: Why Lululemon (LULU) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of athletic apparel retailer Lululemon (NASDAQ:LULU) fell 12.3% in the afternoon session after the company appointed former Nike executive Heidi O'Neill as its new CEO, a move that failed to reassure investors about the company's future direction.
